subcodes.first_line: O blessed Leaf, render thanks unto the Ancient Beauty, the Living, the Mighty, for from the dawn of thy existence thou hast been sheltered beneath the shadow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه المبارکه شکر کن جمال قدیم و حی قدیر را که از بدایت حیات در ظل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
